title: Fuze
tmdbOverview: An unexploded WWII bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation against a ticking clock.
synopsis: Fuze (2026) is a action, crime and drama film from United Kingdom. It carries a 6.4 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
